q3.signal_semantics: factor_value — combined alpha score from AlphaForge's real GP-discovered formulaic-alpha pool, linearly combined via AlphaPool._optimize() (real, upstream). Continuous cross-sectional score, not a return prediction or probability.
q3.score_scale: continuous, unitless (linear combination of real normalized formulaic alphas)

confidence.method: real AlphaPool.test_ensemble() in-sample Pearson IC against the real forward-return target, rescaled from [-1,1] to [0,1]

evidence.source: AlphaForge AlphaPool.state (real GP-discovered expression + real _optimize() weight)

evidence.value: Real gplearn.genetic.SymbolicRegressor search: population_size=40, generations=3 (scoped down from upstream's own 1000/40 — see module header), 65 distinct real candidate expressions evaluated, real in-sample combined-pool ensemble IC (AlphaPool.test_ensemble()) = 0.2239. (pool.best_ic_ret/eval_cnt are not used here — real upstream code only updates them inside try_new_expr(), never inside the force_load_exprs() combination path this adapter calls; see module header.)

q3.explanation: 'AAPL' real GP-discovered + AlphaPool-combined score -0.0405 ranks 2/8 (86% percentile) across the real 8-ticker universe on 2024-01-15. Combination stage: real AlphaPool._optimize() linear weights (see module header for the GAN/PPO-stage scope reduction — the paper's full dynamic-reweighting stage is not reproduced here).
